name: Competitive landscape
prompt: Map the competitive landscape for a B2B customer data platform (CDP) targeting e-commerce companies.

name: Review mining
prompt: Analyze G2 reviews for Segment (the CDP) and identify the top complaints and reasons customers switch away.

name: Battlecard
prompt: Build a battlecard for our CDP vs. Segment.

name: Win/loss analysis
prompt: We lost 3 deals to Competitor X last quarter. How should I structure a win/loss analysis to understand why?
